title: Chemistry — Stoichiometry
description: Mole relations, limiting reagent workflow, ideal gas snapshot.

blocks.title: Typical steps
blocks.markdown:
| Step | Action |
|------|--------|
| 1 | Balance equation |
| 2 | Convert given → moles |
| 3 | Mole ratio from coeffs |
| 4 | Convert moles → desired unit |

blocks.title: Limiting reagent
blocks.mermaid:
flowchart TD
  A[Balance rxn] --> B[Moles of each reactant]
  B --> C[Divide by coeff]
  C --> D[Smallest = limiting]
  D --> E[Product moles from limiting]
